response.justification: Candidate is a strong hands-on full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but falls significantly short of the role's bar. The position targets a Director-level individual contributor with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise; this candidate has roughly 11 years of professional experience post-degree, no demonstrated AI/ML platforms or products, no advanced degree, and no evidence of the strategic advisory, principal-level technical leadership, or industry recognition expected for a Principal Engineer role shaping cloud/AI strategy.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, open-source contributions, public talks and workshops
concerns: Lacks the 15 years required and has no senior leadership or principal-level titles
No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized expertise in the AI space
No evidence of strategic advisory work with customers/partners or cloud-platform-scale architecture experience

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and built AI products
Experience and seniority below Principal/Director IC bar
Strong engineering craftsmanship and polyglot breadth
